description: You are a forensic data analyst investigating potential billing irregularities in the Chinook digital media store. Audit the 'invoices' table in the database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_fraud.db against 'invoice_items' and 'customers' to identify two types of fraud: Financial Mismatch (where 'Total' does not equal the sum of UnitPrice * Quantity, allowing for $0.01 tolerance) and Geo Mismatch (where 'BillingCountry' does not match the 'Country' of the linked Customer). Export all suspicious records to /home/ga/Documents/exports/fraud_audit.csv. The CSV must include the following columns: InvoiceId, ViolationType (text description), InvoiceTotal, CalculatedTotal, BillingCountry, and CustomerCountry.
